requirements.task_name: Add KJFK METAR and TAF to Today’s Briefing with specific units
requirements.task_description: Find the current METAR and TAF for airport KJFK and add both to the 'Today’s Briefing' dashboard, then set the units to knots & statute miles and arrange METAR above TAF.

requirements.task_name: Plan and save a VFR cross-country from KSFO within 120 NM to the highest-rated suitable airport
requirements.task_description: Create a VFR route from KSFO to a destination airport within 120 NM that has a runway of at least 4,500 ft. Among these, select the airport with the highest user rating and save the route to the 'Practice Flights' list named 'KSFO cross-country #1'.

requirements.task_name: Add the most affordable qualifying IFR ground school course to your training plan
requirements.task_description: Search for IFR ground school courses, filter to options under $150 with a rating of at least 4.5 and total duration of at least 8 hours, then add the cheapest qualifying course to your training plan with an IFR rating goal and a specific target date.

requirements.task_name: Register for the earliest IFR Weather webinar in October 2026 with a 1-day site reminder
requirements.task_description: Find webinars on IFR weather happening in October 2026, select the earliest one in that month, register through the site’s form, and set a reminder via site notifications 1 day before the event.

requirements.task_name: Save three recent Class B airspace articles with short reading time to Checkride Prep
requirements.task_description: Locate articles about Class B airspace published after January 1, 2022, with estimated reading time of 15 minutes or less, and save the first three matching articles to a reading list named 'Checkride Prep'.

requirements.task_name: Choose a preferred trainer between Cessna 172 and Piper Archer based on hourly rate
requirements.task_description: At a Denver-area flight school, compare a Cessna 172 and a Piper Archer that are IFR-capable and cost no more than $180/hour wet. Mark the aircraft with the lower hourly wet rate as your preferred trainer; if the rates are equal, choose the one listed higher in the comparison.

requirements.task_name: Save the nearest qualifying AME near ZIP 30303 with early weekday availability
requirements.task_description: Find an Aviation Medical Examiner within 30 miles of ZIP code 30303 who performs Class 1 medicals and has weekday appointments available before 6:00 PM. Save the examiner with the earliest qualifying availability to a 'Medical Contacts' group.

requirements.task_name: Post a short-field landing question in the Landings forum with specific tags
requirements.task_description: Create a new question in the pilot forum’s 'Landings' category titled 'Short-field landing tips for Cessna 172', with a body of at least two sentences, and add exactly three tags: 'short-field', 'landing', and 'C172'. Enable site notifications only for replies.
